agio: noun. The premium or percentage on a better sort of money when it is given in exchange for an inferior sort.
ago: adjective. Gone; gone by; gone away; passed; passed away.
agon: noun. A struggle or contest; conflict; especially between the protagonist and antagonist in a literary work.
ain: noun. Alternative form of ayin (“Semitic letter”).
ani: noun. Any bird of the genus Crotophaga in the cuckoo family.
annoy: verb. To disturb or irritate, especially by continued or repeated acts; to bother with unpleasant deeds.
annoying: adjective. Causing irritation or annoyance; troublesome; vexatious.
any: adverb. To even the slightest extent, at all.
ayin: noun. The sixteenth letter of many Semitic alphabets/abjads (Phoenician, Aramaic, Hebrew, Syriac, Arabic and others).
gay: adjective. Homosexual: Only possessing sexual and/or romantic attraction towards people one perceives to be the same sex or gender as
gin: noun. A colourless non - aged alcoholic liquor made by distilling fermented grains such as barley, corn, oats or rye with juniper berries;
ginny: adjective. Affected by gin; resembling or characteristic of gin.
goa: noun. A Tibetan gazelle of species Procapra picticaudata, an antelope that inhabits the Tibetan Plateau.
goy: noun. A non- Jew, a gentile.
inn: noun. Any establishment where travellers can procure lodging, food, and drink.
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
nag: noun. A small horse; a pony.
nan: noun. Synonym of maid: a servant girl.
ninny: noun. A silly or foolish person.
ninon: noun. A sheer fabric of silk, rayon, or nylon made in a variety of tight smooth weaves or open lacy patterns.
nog: noun. A wooden block, the size of a brick, built into a wall, as a hold for the nails of woodwork.
yang: noun. A principle in Chinese and related East Asian philosophies associated with bright, hot, masculine, etc. elements of the natural world.
yin: noun. A principle in Chinese and related East Asian philosophies associated with dark, cool, female, etc. elements of the natural world.
yoga: noun. Any of several Hindu or Buddhist disciplines aimed at training the consciousness for a state of perfect spiritual insight and
yogi: noun. A devotee or adherent of yoga.
yon: determiner. Distant, but within sight; (that thing) just over there.
yoni: noun. The vulva or vagina, or a symbol of them, especially as an object of veneration within certain types of Hinduism, Buddhism, and other
agy: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southern Alta.
anyon: noun. Any particle that obeys a continuum of quantum statistics, only two of which are the standard Bose-Einstein and Fermi-Dirac
gonna: verb. A modal used to express a future action that is being planned or prepared for in the present.
ing: noun. A meadow, especially a low meadow near a river; water meadow.
inga: noun. Any of the genus Inga of small tropical trees and shrubs.
ingo: noun. The frame of a door, window, fireplace, or similar structure.
iyo: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mesaka.
naio: noun. Myoporum sandwicense, a flowering plant in the figwort family.
ngaio: noun. An evergreen tree of species Myoporum laetum, native to New Zealand.
nina: noun. A hidden message revealed in the completed grid of a crossword.
niyoga: noun. An ancient tradition of the Svayambhuva Manu sect in which a childless woman could appoint a man to help her bear a child.
noa: adjective. Non-taboo; serving to replace a taboo name or term.
noy: verb. To annoy; to harm or injure.
noying: verb. present participle and gerund of noy
oni: noun. A Japanese evil spirit or demon.
onning: verb. present participle and gerund of on
yag: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Yámana.
yoi: noun. A preparatory position in karate, with the arms slightly forward, elbows slightly bent, and fists closed.
